edition: UNVERIFIED — uploader-attributed PDF, edition not stated on archive.org metadata page; uploader SrihariPKurudi (2022); requires visual inspection before citation as Panchamukhi 1980–1981 or any other named edition

expected_text_units.source_for_estimate: Sub-commentary on Madhva BSB; one tattva-prakāśikā gloss per BSB sūtra ≈ 555

first_page_visual_quality_notes: Heuristic (KB/page ~3): producer 'Acrobat Distiller 8.0.0' + 897 KB / 328 pp suggests a *born-digital text PDF*, not a scan. If so, this is ideal for OCR (or pdftotext would suffice). Visual confirmation is the open question, not OCR-difficulty.
ocr_friendliness_notes: Almost certainly text-PDF (not image-PDF); pdftotext or copy-paste will yield clean Sanskrit. Still requires edition identification before any quotation can be made.
